html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Winter's Feast

“Captures the spirit of food when this is put on a Winter's Feast Table. The more, the merrier.”

-

The Winter's Feast Dishes are cooked in a Masonry Oven. Each recipe requires 1 Holiday Cheer and two other ingredients to craft. They can be placed on Winter's Feast Table for players to eat.

Feast Recipes
Feast Name Recipe Spawn code
Merry Berrysauce ×2 16 "berrysauce"
Bibingka ×2 20 "bibingka"
Cabbage Rolls ×2 16 "cabbagerolls"
Festive Fish Dish 20 "festivefish"
Good Gravy 20 "gravy"
Latkes 16 "latkes"
Lutefisk 28 "lutefisk"
Mulled Punch 20 "mulleddrink"
Panettone ×2 20 "panettone"
Pavlova ×2 20 "pavlova"
Pickled Herring 24 "pickledherring"
Polish Cookies ×2 20 "polishcookie"
Pumpkin Pie 20 "pumpkinpie"
Roasted Turkey 24 "roastturkey"
Stuffing ×2 20 "stuffing"
Sweet Potato Casserole ×2 20 "sweetpotato"
Tamales ×2 20 "tamales"
Tourtiere 20 "tourtiere"

Contents

  • 1 Merry Berrysauce
  • 2 Bibingka
  • 3 Cabbage Rolls
  • 4 Festive Fish Dish
  • 5 Good Gravy
  • 6 Latkes
  • 7 Lutefisk
  • 8 Mulled Punch
  • 9 Panettone
  • 10 Pavlova
  • 11 Pickled Herring
  • 12 Polish Cookies
  • 13 Pumpkin Pie
  • 14 Roasted Turkey
  • 15 Stuffing
  • 16 Sweet Potato Casserole
  • 17 Tamales
  • 18 Tourtiere
  • 19 Trivia
  • 20 Gallery

Merry Berrysauce

Bibingka

Good Gravy

Stuffing

Sweet Potato Casserole

Tamales

Tourtiere

Trivia

  • Wortox's quotes for many Winter's Feast Dishes seem to suggest that none of the food is actually real, and is instead an illusion created by Holiday Cheer.
  • Some of the dishes seem to change their form depending on who is eating them, with Wigfrid commenting on the presence of meat in vegetable dishes, and Wurt claiming that meat dishes are actually vegetables in disguise.
  • Maxwell's quote for Roasted Turkey is a possible reference to How the Grinch Stole Christmas, in which the Whos of Whoville eat a "roast beast" as part of their celebrations. After the Grinch has a change of heart, he is invited to the Whos' feast and ends up carving the roast beast himself.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
Winter's FeastCraftable Items

Merry Berrysauce[edit | edit source]
Merry Berrysauce
"Fill your belly with a bowl full of jelly."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
16 sec
Miscellaneous
"berrysauce"
“Equal parts merry and berry.”
–Wilson
“This is the best part!”
–Willow
“Is very berry!”
–Wolfgang
“Abigail would love this...”
–Wendy
“PRE-MASHED FOR EFFICIENT DIGESTION”
–WX-78
“How festive!”
–Wickerbottom
“It's as sweet as you are, Luce.”
–Woodie
“This seems like a lot of fuss for mashed berries.”
–Maxwell
“It löoks like vile berries but... that smell... cöuld it be meat?”
–Wigfrid
“It's so sweet it almost tastes like candy!”
–Webber
“Made from only the most festive berries.”
–Warly
“Mushy sweet balls”
–Wormwood
“Pass it over here!”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, what a fun trick!”
–Wortox
“Yummy yummy berries!”
–Wurt
“It somehow tastes better then regular berries!”
–Walter
“Why bother putting it on something else when you can eat it by itself?”
–Wanda
Bibingka[edit | edit source]
Bibingka
"This dish will leaf you wanting more."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"bibingka"
“Soft and spongy.”
–Wilson
“Mmm, I can still smell the fire.”
–Willow
“Leafy bread fill Wolfgang's mighty belly!”
–Wolfgang
“This bread has a most curious texture.”
–Wendy
“THE PLATE SEEMS REDUNDANT”
–WX-78
“Traditionally, bibingka is baked in a specialized clay oven.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's got a nice flavour to it.”
–Woodie
“It has a unique spongy texture.”
–Maxwell
“Surely this löaf must be made öf meat!”
–Wigfrid
“Huh, it's like a sweet bread!”
–Webber
“A tasty holiday treat from the Philippines.”
–Warly
“Wrapped in friends”
–Wormwood
“I'll give it a try!”
–Winona
“I would've have made a great Ani-ani.”
–Wortox
“Like this!”
–Wurt
“Whoa.. where did we get the shaved coconut from?”
–Walter
“Bready and delicious.”
–Wanda
Cabbage Rolls[edit | edit source]
Cabbage Rolls
"Get your holiday feast rolling."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
16 sec
Miscellaneous
"cabbagerolls"
“The meat hides in the cabbage to avoid predators.”
–Wilson
“Yeah, I can roll with these.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang likes his cabbage rolls smothered in sauerkraut!”
–Wolfgang
“I wouldn't mind rolling up in a blanket and forgetting my troubles...”
–Wendy
“THE FLESHLINGS ENJOY WRAPPING FOOD IN OTHER FOOD”
–WX-78
“Variations of this dish can be found across Europe and Asia.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's some tasty grub!”
–Woodie
“Meat rolled in cabbage. How exciting.”
–Maxwell
“Begöne foul cabbage, I shall feast ön the meat within.”
–Wigfrid
“We hope Ms. Wickerbottom doesn't find out we didn't eat the cabbage...”
–Webber
“A surprisingly time consuming dish, but well worth the wait.”
–Warly
“Rolled up belly stuff.”
–Wormwood
“That'll put meat on your bones!”
–Winona
“They look so real!”
–Wortox
“Cabbage rolled up with more cabbage, flort!”
–Wurt
“This would make great camping food!”
–Walter
“Meat rolled in cabbage, simple as that.”
–Wanda
Festive Fish Dish[edit | edit source]
Festive Fish Dish
"It just isn't the holidays without it."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"festivefish"
“I wouldn't mind sampling some seasonal seafood.”
–Wilson
“It's just so festive!”
–Willow
“Is good fish for holidays.”
–Wolfgang
“It's about as festive as i feel.”
–Wendy
“DETECTING HIGH AMOUNTS OF... UGH... "CHEER"...”
–WX-78
“I'm unfamiliar with the origins of this dish.”
–Wickerbottom
“Season's fishings!”
–Woodie
“I don't know what's so festive about it.”
–Maxwell
“Let us celebrate the seasön by feasting ön fish flesh!”
–Wigfrid
“Mmm, Tasty!”
–Webber
“There's always room for new traditions!”
–Warly
“Fancy Glub Glub.”
–Wormwood
“Sure, why not.”
–Winona
“Nothing fishy here at all, Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Someone playing tricks, it just veggies shapes like fish!”
–Wurt
“Fish with some special seasonal seasonings.”
–Walter
“I didn't thing nutmeg and cinnamon would go so well with fish!”
–Wanda
Good Gravy[edit | edit source]
Good Gravy
"All aboard the gravy train."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"gravy"
“It's all gravy.”
–Wilson
“Yeah! Pour on the gravy!”
–Willow
“Gravy is good indeed!”
–Wolfgang
“How we try to add flavor to our bland and meaningless lives.”
–Wendy
“IT WILL LUBRICATE THE PATH TO MY STOMACH”
–WX-78
“Oh my, it's a bit rich for me.”
–Wickerbottom
“It really floats my gravy boat.”
–Woodie
“I have a tendency to overdo it on the gravy.”
–Maxwell
“A sauce wörth öf the göds themselves.”
–Wigfrid
“We like lots of gravy!”
–Webber
“Rich and full of flavor.”
–Warly
“Not mud?”
–Wormwood
“Now we're talking!”
–Winona
“It sits in a boat that doesn't float.”
–Wortox
“Mmmm, is chocolate!”
–Wurt
“Pass it over here!”
–Walter
“I don't need a turkey to pour it over, just hand me a spoon.”
–Wanda
Latkes[edit | edit source]
Latkes
"You'll like them a latke."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
16 sec
Miscellaneous
"latkes"
“I could eat a latke more of these.”
–Wilson
“No skimping on the sour cream!”
–Willow
“Will eat many, many of these.”
–Wolfgang
“They are... quite tasty.”
–Wendy
“FLESHLINGS ENJOY POTATOES IN MANY FORMS”
–WX-78
“Delightfully crispy.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'll never say no to potatoes.”
–Woodie
“They're acceptable.”
–Maxwell
“My eyes see föul pötatöes, but the taste öf meat is unmistakable!”
–Wigfrid
“They're like pancakes made of potatoes!”
–Webber
“Some chives, a dollop of sour cream, c'est parfait!”
–Warly
“Potato bits”
–Wormwood
“I love me some potatoes!”
–Winona
“I wonder what would happen if i took a bite.”
–Wortox
“Is good and crunchy!”
–Wurt
“I've never tried potatoes cooked like this before.”
–Walter
“Delicious discs of crisp potatoes.”
–Wanda
Lutefisk[edit | edit source]
Lutefisk
"Sea-son's eatings."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
28 sec
Miscellaneous
"lutefisk"
“Is there any trumpetfisk?”
–Wilson
“It actually looks pretty tasty.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will eat the stinky fish.”
–Wolfgang
“Maybe I'll just try a bite.”
–Wendy
“IT SMELLS STRONGLY OF CHEMICALS. I LIKE IT”
–WX-78
“The fish is dried and then soaked in lye, hence the odd aroma.”
–Wickerbottom
“Weird, it almost tastes like salmon.”
–Woodie
“It has a odd, yet strangely mouthwatering aroma.”
–Maxwell
“A true Viking delicacy!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks weird... but tastes great!”
–Webber
“A traditional Scandinavian holiday recipe.”
–Warly
“Mushy Glub Glub.”
–Wormwood
“That doesn't look half bad!”
–Winona
“It smells real enough.”
–Wortox
“Is just potatoes mushed into fish shape!”
–Wurt
“Once you get past the smell, it's not half bad!”
–Walter
“This celebration involves a surprising amount of fish.”
–Wanda
Mulled Punch[edit | edit source]
Mulled Punch
"A hot drink for a cold winter."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"mulleddrink"
“This punch has a kick to it.”
–Wilson
“Ahh, it's like there's a warm fire in my tummy.”
–Willow
“Is good, cozy drink.”
–Wolfgang
“Can it thaw a cold, broken heart?”
–Wendy
“HOT SPICED FUEL”
–WX-78
“A taste of Yuletide cheer.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nothing better against the cold!”
–Woodie
“It brings a small respite from this wretched cold.”
–Maxwell
“Ha ha! Anöther!”
–Wigfrid
“Warms us right up!”
–Webber
“The taste of cinnamon puts me right in the holiday mood!”
–Warly
“Makes inside warm.”
–Wormwood
“I ain't one to pull my punches... but I'll mull them! Ha!”
–Winona
“Perhaps I'll mull it over, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Mmmm, warms up tummy!”
–Wurt
“I like to use the cinnamon stick as a straw.”
–Walter
“It warms you from the inside out.”
–Wanda
Panettone[edit | edit source]
Panettone
"Like fruitcake, but edible!"
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"panettone"
“This yuletide bread really rose to the occasion.”
–Wilson

–Willow
“Is good, sweet bread.”
–Wolfgang
“It's... delicious.”
–Wendy
“ENHANCED BREAD”
–WX-78
“The origins of this bread trace all the way back to ancient Rome.”
–Wickerbottom
“Even bread gets sweeter over the holidays!”
–Woodie
“Fruitcake's more agreeable cousin.”
–Maxwell
“My eyes döth deceive me, t'is surely meat.”
–Wigfrid
“Are we sure that isn't a fruitcake in disguise?”
–Webber
“A traditional Italian yuletide treat.”
–Warly
“Tiny friends inside!”
–Wormwood
“Huh, some kind of fancy-shmancy holiday bread?”
–Winona
“This holiday bread is all in your head!”
–Wortox
“Tasty tasty bread!”
–Wurt
“I could eat this forever.”
–Walter
“Mmmmmm, bread.”
–Wanda

Pavlova
"Light and crisp as new fallen snow."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting

20 sec
Miscellaneous
"pavlova"
“I lova good Pavlova.”
–Wilson

–Wolfgang
“It's brittle and delicate, like life itself.”

–WX-78
“It takes its name from the Russian ballerina Anna Pavlova.”
–Wickerbottom
“Reminds me of the snow-capped mountains back home.”
–Woodie
“It has a certain elegance to it.”
–Maxwell
“Önce the berries hath been remöved, t'is a fine dish indeed.”
–Wigfrid
“We love anything with sugar!”
–Webber
“Ah, a fresh carrot!”
–Warly
“Crunchy.”
–Wormwood
“Is cake supposed to crunch? Not that I'm complainin'!”
–Winona
“I'm afraid you can't fool me.”
–Wortox
“Fancy cook man call it a mer... mer-ingy... mer-angy...”
–Wurt
“Mmmm, it almost reminds me of a perfectly roasted marshmallow.”
–Walter
“It's crispier then I expected, but not unpleasantly so.”
–Wanda
Pickled Herring[edit | edit source]
Pickled Herring
"A salty seasonal supper."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
24 sec
Miscellaneous
"pickledherring"
“You won't be herring any complaints from me.”
–Wilson
“How does it smell so good?”
–Willow
“Good fish, get in belly.”
–Wolfgang
“It tastes... good.”
–Wendy
“PRESERVED FISH FLESH”
–WX-78
“I do enjoy some pickled herring around the holidays.”
–Wickerbottom
“It actually looks pretty good.”
–Woodie
“I supposed I can't be picky.”
–Maxwell
“A briny taste öf the sea!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks tasty but... pickled fish?”
–Webber
“It's really quite delicious.”
–Warly
“Salty Glub Glub.”
–Wormwood
“It's actually not bad!”
–Winona
“Shall I pick a peck of pickled herrings?”
–Wortox
“Grow! Grow!”
–Wurt
“Pickling is a really practical way to store food supply.”
–Walter
“It must be a sort of delicacy.”
–Wanda
Polish Cookies[edit | edit source]
Polish Cookies
"Just like babcia used to make."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"polishcookie"
“I'll polish off this whole plate!”
–Wilson
“Yup, I'll be having ten more of those.”
–Willow
“Ah, bring back good memories.”
–Wolfgang
“I suppose... it wouldn't hurt to have one...”
–Wendy
“PROCEEDING TO CLEAR COOKIES”
–WX-78
“Now it feels like the holidays.”
–Wickerbottom
“Whoops, I think I got some jam in my beard.”
–Woodie
“How quaint.”
–Maxwell
“My nöse shall nöt be deceived, these are surely meat!”
–Wigfrid
“Yay, we love cookies!”
–Webber
“A rich pastry with a sweet fruity filling.”
–Warly
“Sweet belly stuff.”
–Wormwood
“Tasty!”
–Winona
“You can't prank a prankster, Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Yummy fruit pockets!”
–Wurt
“It has fruit inside, it has to be at least a little healthy.”
–Walter
“I'll just put a few extras in my pocket... don't mind me.”
–Wanda
Pumpkin Pie[edit | edit source]
Pumpkin Pie
"Gourd tidings we bring."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
20 sec
Miscellaneous

“I should probably just eat the whole thing.. for science.”

–Willow

–Wolfgang

“Perhaps just a nibble...”

“I won't say no to some pie.”
–Woodie
“Well... perhaps just a slice.”
–Maxwell
“T'is surely a deliciöus meat pie in disguise!”
–Wigfrid
“We'd like a big slice, please!”
–Webber
“Simple and classic.”
–Warly
“Mmmm...”
–Wormwood
“T'is the season for some good eatin'!”
–Winona
“Don't be shy, try the pie!”
–Wortox
“Mmmmmmmmmm!”
–Wurt
“Mmmm, cut me a big slice!”
–Walter
“Why waste time cutting it into slices when I can just eat the whole thing?”
–Wanda
Roasted Turkey[edit | edit source]
Roasted Turkey
"Gobble-gobble it up."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
24 sec
Miscellaneous

“I see a big juicy drumstick with my name on it.”
–Wilson
“Everything tastes better with fire.”

“Wolfgang hungry for bird meat!”
–Wolfgang
“The holidays were cut short for this poor bird.”

“I WILL FEAST ON THE DEAD BIRD FLESH”

–Webber
“The Pièce of résistance to any holiday feast!”

“Tweeter go in belly!”

“Now that's a beautiful bird!”

“It certainly looks like a turkey.”
–Wortox
“It look like yucky turkey, but smell like veggies?”
–Wurt
“Woby wants some too!”
–Walter
“What an enormous turkey leg!”
–Wanda

Stuffing
"Stuff your face!"
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"stuffing"
“That's the good stuff!”
–Wilson
“Out of the turkey and into my stomach!”
–Willow
“Bread chunks very good!”
–Wolfgang
“Perhaps filling my belly will make me feel less empty inside.”
–Wendy
“I ENJOY THESE SMALL BREAD CHUNKS”
–WX-78
“Pairs perfectly with some turkey and gravy.”

“I'm stuffed to the brim!”
–Woodie
“Something to fill the void in my stomach.”
–Maxwell
“It bears the scent öf meat. I will sample a mörsel.”

“It smells so good!”
–Webber
“To preserve the crispness, I actually cook it separate from the turkey.”

“Tasty bready bits”
–Wormwood
“I could eat this for days!”

“Why fill yourself with dread when you could fill yourself with bread?”

“Tasty bready bits.”
–Wurt
“I could stuff a bit more in my mouth.”
–Walter
“I'm never too full for a little extra stuffing.”
–Wanda
Sweet Potato Casserole[edit | edit source]
Sweet Potato Casserole
"It's a marshmallow world in the winter."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"sweetpotato"
“Science has created a hybrid between dinner and dessert.”
–Wilson
“Don't mind if I do.”
–Willow
“Is very sweet, but see no potato.”
–Wolfgang
“Oh Abigail, remember how mother would make this every year?”
–Wendy
“ERROR: NOT POTATO”
–WX-78
“It's always a hit at holiday get-togethers.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't mind if I do!”
–Woodie
“How very... rustic.”
–Maxwell
“Marshmallöws ön meat... t'is an ödd choice, but deliciöus!”
–Wigfrid
“Are those marshmallows on top?”
–Webber
“All the sweetness of the holidays.”
–Warly
“Yummy yum!”
–Wormwood
“Sticks to yer ribs!”
–Winona
“Should I tell them it's just a prank? Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“This even better then normal potato!”
–Wurt
“It just isn't the holidays without it!”
–Walter
“An odd recipe, but I can't say I don't enjoy it.”
–Wanda
Tamales[edit | edit source]
Tamales
"Spice up your holiday spread."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×2
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"tamales"
“If I eat much more I'm going to start to feel a little husky.”
–Wilson
“It's like a little bit of fire in my mouth!”
–Willow
“Was Wolfgang not supposed to eat husk of corn?”
–Wolfgang
“Little pockets of warmth in this cold world.”
–Wendy
“YES. I WILL EAT THEM ALL”
–WX-78
“The spice is actually quite mild, quite to my liking.”
–Wickerbottom
“These'll spice up our holiday feast, eh?”
–Woodie
“They've got a bit of kick to them.”
–Maxwell
“Öh hö! This bready wrap hides a mörsel öf spiced meat!”
–Wigfrid
“Mmm, spicy!”
–Webber
“You can taste the care that went into this dish.”
–Warly
“Friends holding it.”
–Wormwood
“Now that'll warm you right up!”
–Winona
“Very convincing.”
–Wortox
“Mmm, hot veggie bits inside.”
–Wurt
“Whoa, these are tasty!”
–Walter
“They're piping hot!”
–Wanda
Tourtiere[edit | edit source]
Tourtiere
"A savory seasonal pie."
Object Info
180 uses
Can be Burned
Crafting
×1 ×1 ×1
20 sec
Miscellaneous
"tourtiere"
“Pleased to eat you.”
–Wilson
“Get into my pie hole!”
–Willow
“Is pie filled with much protein!”
–Wolfgang
“I cannot be comforted by comfort food... but I will have some more...”
–Wendy
“IT'S A DELICIOUS FLESH PIE”
–WX-78
“A rather hearty meat pie.”
–Wickerbottom
“If only I had some ketchup!”
–Woodie
“I haven't had a meat pie since I left Liverpool.”
–Maxwell
“Pie hath redeemed itself!”
–Wigfrid
“We've never meat in a pie before.”
–Webber
“Ah oui, now that's a meat pie!”
–Warly
“Mmm... hot belly stuff”
–Wormwood
“Now that's a good meat pie!”
–Winona
“A pie, not sweet, but filled with meat.”
–Wortox
“Mmm, is hot veggie pie!”
–Wurt
“My cousin from the west coast made this for us one, they're the best!”
–Walter
“This is exactly what I imagined a mincemeat pie would be like.”
–Wanda
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Wortox's quotes for many Winter's Feast Dishes seem to suggest that none of the food is actually real, and is instead an illusion created by Holiday Cheer.
Some of the dishes seem to change their form depending on who is eating them, with Wigfrid commenting on the presence of meat in vegetable dishes, and Wurt claiming that meat dishes are actually vegetables in disguise.
Maxwell's quote for Roasted Turkey is a possible reference to How the Grinch Stole Christmas, in which the Whos of Whoville eat a "roast beast" as part of their celebrations. After the Grinch has a change of heart, he is invited to the Whos' feast and ends up carving the roast beast himself.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Các món ăn trong bữa tiệc mùa đông được nấu trong Lò xây. Mỗi công thức yêu cầu 1 Holiday Cheer và hai nguyên liệu khác để chế tạo. Chúng có thể được đặt trên Bàn Tiệc Mùa Đông để người chơi dùng bữa.
title: Winter's Feast Dishes
wikitext: {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{Event|Winter's Feast}} {{Scrapbook Info|Captures the spirit of food when this is put on a Winter's Feast Table. The more, the merrier.}} The '''Winter's Feast Dishes''' are cooked in a [[Masonry Oven]]. Each recipe requires 1 [[Holiday Cheer]] and two other ingredients to craft. They can be placed on [[Winter's Feast Table]] for players to eat. {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" |+Feast Recipes |- ! scope="col" style="text-align:center;" |Feast ! scope="col" {{pic32|Stinger}}×2 || 20 || "tamales" |- | [[File:Tourtiere.png|32px]] || '''Tourtiere''' || {{pic32|Holiday Cheer}} {{pic32|Birchnut}} {{pic32|Pine Cone}}|| 20 || "tourtiere" |} ==Merry Berrysauce== {{Object Infobox |description = Fill your belly with a bowl full of jelly. |name = Merry Berrysauce |icon = Merry Berrysauce.png |image = Merry Berrysauce Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Mosquito Sack |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "berrysauce" |cooktimeFeast = 16 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = Equal parts merry and berry. |willow = This is the best part! |wolfgang = Is very berry! |wendy = Abigail would love this... |wx78 = PRE-MASHED FOR EFFICIENT DIGESTION |wickerbottom = How festive! |woodie = It's as sweet as you are, Luce. |maxwell = This seems like a lot of fuss for mashed berries. |wigfrid = It löoks like vile berries but... that smell... cöuld it be meat? |webber = It's so sweet it almost tastes like candy! |winona = Pass it over here! |warly = Made from only the most festive berries. |wortox = Hyuyuyu, what a fun trick! |wormwood = Mushy sweet balls |wurt = Yummy yummy berries! |walter = It somehow tastes better then regular berries! |wanda = Why bother putting it on something else when you can eat it by itself? |choose = wilson }} {{clear}} ==Bibingka== {{Object Infobox |description =This dish will leaf you wanting more. |name = Bibingka |icon = Bibingka.png |image = Bibingka Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Foliage |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "bibingka" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = Soft and spongy. |willow = Mmm, I can still smell the fire. |wolfgang = Leafy bread fill Wolfgang's mighty belly! |wendy = This bread has a most curious texture. |wx78 = THE PLATE SEEMS REDUNDANT |wickerbottom = Traditionally, bibingka is baked in a specialized clay oven. |woodie = It's got a nice flavour to it. |maxwell = It has a unique spongy texture. |wigfrid = Surely this löaf must be made öf meat! |webber = Huh, it's like a sweet bread! |winona = I'll give it a try! |warly = A tasty holiday treat from the Philippines. |wortox = I would've have made a great Ani-ani. |wormwood = Wrapped in friends |wurt = Like this! |walter = Whoa.. where did we get the shaved coconut from? |wanda = Bready and delicious. |choose = walter }} {{clear}} ==Cabbage Rolls== {{Object Infobox |description =Get your holiday feast rolling. |name = Cabbage Rolls |icon = Cabbage Rolls.png |image = Cabbage Rolls Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Cut Reeds |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "cabbagerolls" |cooktimeFeast = 16 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = The meat hides in the cabbage to avoid predators. |willow = Yeah, I can roll with these. |wolfgang = Wolfgang likes his cabbage rolls smothered in sauerkraut! |wendy = I wouldn't mind rolling up in a blanket and forgetting my troubles... |wx78 = THE FLESHLINGS ENJOY WRAPPING FOOD IN OTHER FOOD |wickerbottom = Variations of this dish can be found across Europe and Asia. |woodie = That's some tasty grub! |maxwell = Meat rolled in cabbage. How exciting. |wigfrid = Begöne foul cabbage, I shall feast ön the meat within. |webber = We hope Ms. Wickerbottom doesn't find out we didn't eat the cabbage... |winona = That'll put meat on your bones! |warly = A surprisingly time consuming dish, but well worth the wait. |wortox = They look so real! |wormwood = Rolled up belly stuff. |wurt = Cabbage rolled up with more cabbage, flort! |walter = This would make great camping food! |wanda = Meat rolled in cabbage, simple as that. |choose = willow }} {{clear}} ==Festive Fish Dish== {{Object Infobox |description =It just isn't the holidays without it. |name = Festive Fish Dish |icon =Festive Fish Dish.png |image = Festive Fish Dish Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Spoiled Fish Morsel |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Petals |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "festivefish" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I wouldn't mind sampling some seasonal seafood. |willow = It's just so festive! |wolfgang = Is good fish for holidays. |wendy = It's about as festive as i feel. |wx78 = DETECTING HIGH AMOUNTS OF... UGH... "CHEER"... |wickerbottom = I'm unfamiliar with the origins of this dish. |woodie = Season's fishings! |maxwell = I don't know what's so festive about it. |wigfrid = Let us celebrate the seasön by feasting ön fish flesh! |webber = Mmm, Tasty! |winona = Sure, why not. |warly = There's always room for new traditions! |wortox = Nothing fishy here at all, Hyuyu! |wormwood = Fancy Glub Glub. |wurt = Someone playing tricks, it just veggies shapes like fish! |walter = Fish with some special seasonal seasonings. |wanda = I didn't thing nutmeg and cinnamon would go so well with fish! |choose = warly }} {{clear}} ==Good Gravy== {{Object Infobox |description =All aboard the gravy train. |name = Good Gravy |icon =Good Gravy.png |image = Good Gravy Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Rot |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Bone Shards/DST |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "gravy" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = It's all gravy. |willow = Yeah! Pour on the gravy! |wolfgang = Gravy is good indeed! |wendy = How we try to add flavor to our bland and meaningless lives. |wx78 = IT WILL LUBRICATE THE PATH TO MY STOMACH |wickerbottom = Oh my, it's a bit rich for me. |woodie = It really floats my gravy boat. |maxwell = I have a tendency to overdo it on the gravy. |wigfrid = A sauce wörth öf the göds themselves. |webber = We like lots of gravy! |winona = Now we're talking! |warly = Rich and full of flavor. |wortox = It sits in a boat that doesn't float. |wormwood = Not mud? |wurt = Mmmm, is chocolate! |walter = Pass it over here! |wanda = I don't need a turkey to pour it over, just hand me a spoon. |choose = wx78 }} {{clear}} == Latkes== {{Object Infobox |description =You'll like them a latke. |name = Latkes |icon =Latkes.png |image = Latkes Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Twigs/DST |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Cut Grass/DST |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "latkes" |cooktimeFeast = 16 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I could eat a latke more of these. |willow = No skimping on the sour cream! |wolfgang = Will eat many, many of these. |wendy = They are... quite tasty. |wx78 = FLESHLINGS ENJOY POTATOES IN MANY FORMS |wickerbottom = Delightfully crispy. |woodie = I'll never say no to potatoes. |maxwell = They're acceptable. |wigfrid = My eyes see föul pötatöes, but the taste öf meat is unmistakable! |webber = They're like pancakes made of potatoes! |winona = I love me some potatoes! |warly = Some chives, a dollop of sour cream, c'est parfait! |wortox = I wonder what would happen if i took a bite. |wormwood = Potato bits |wurt = Is good and crunchy! |walter = I've never tried potatoes cooked like this before. |wanda = Delicious discs of crisp potatoes. |choose = wickerbottom }} {{clear}} ==Lutefisk== {{Object Infobox |description =Sea-son's eatings. |name = Lutefisk |icon =Lutefisk.png |image = Lutefisk Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Spoiled Fish (DST) |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Driftwood Piece |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "lutefisk" |cooktimeFeast = 28 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = Is there any trumpetfisk? |willow = It actually looks pretty tasty. |wolfgang = Wolfgang will eat the stinky fish. |wendy = Maybe I'll just try a bite. |wx78 = IT SMELLS STRONGLY OF CHEMICALS. I LIKE IT |wickerbottom = The fish is dried and then soaked in lye, hence the odd aroma. |woodie = Weird, it almost tastes like salmon. |maxwell = It has a odd, yet strangely mouthwatering aroma. |wigfrid = A true Viking delicacy! |webber = It looks weird... but tastes great! |winona = That doesn't look half bad! |warly = A traditional Scandinavian holiday recipe. |wortox = It smells real enough. |wormwood = Mushy Glub Glub. |wurt = Is just potatoes mushed into fish shape! |walter = Once you get past the smell, it's not half bad! |wanda = This celebration involves a surprising amount of fish. |choose = wigfrid }} {{clear}} ==Mulled Punch== {{Object Infobox |description =A hot drink for a cold winter. |name = Mulled Punch |icon =Mulled Punch.png |image = Mulled Punch Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Dark Petals |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Ice |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "mulleddrink" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = This punch has a kick to it. |willow = Ahh, it's like there's a warm fire in my tummy. |wolfgang = Is good, cozy drink. |wendy = Can it thaw a cold, broken heart? |wx78 = HOT SPICED FUEL |wickerbottom = A taste of Yuletide cheer. |woodie = Nothing better against the cold! |maxwell = It brings a small respite from this wretched cold. |wigfrid = Ha ha! Anöther! |webber = Warms us right up! |winona = I ain't one to pull my punches... but I'll mull them! Ha! |warly = The taste of cinnamon puts me right in the holiday mood! |wortox = Perhaps I'll mull it over, hyuyu! |wormwood = Makes inside warm. |wurt = Mmmm, warms up tummy! |walter = I like to use the cinnamon stick as a straw. |wanda = It warms you from the inside out. |choose = winona }} {{clear}} ==Panettone== {{Object Infobox |description =Like fruitcake, but edible! |name = Panettone |icon =Panettone.png |image = Panettone Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Stone Fruit |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "panettone" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = This yuletide bread really rose to the occasion. |willow = Am I just hungry, or does everything look extra tasty? |wolfgang = Is good, sweet bread. |wendy = It's... delicious. |wx78 = ENHANCED BREAD |wickerbottom = The origins of this bread trace all the way back to ancient Rome. |woodie = Even bread gets sweeter over the holidays! |maxwell = Fruitcake's more agreeable cousin. |wigfrid = My eyes döth deceive me, t'is surely meat. |webber = Are we sure that isn't a fruitcake in disguise? |winona = Huh, some kind of fancy-shmancy holiday bread? |warly = A traditional Italian yuletide treat. |wortox = This holiday bread is all in your head! |wormwood = Tiny friends inside! |wurt = Tasty tasty bread! |walter = I could eat this forever. |wanda = Mmmmmm, bread. |choose = walter }} {{clear}} ==Pavlova== {{Object Infobox |description =Light and crisp as new fallen snow. |name = Pavlova |icon =Pavlova.png |image = Pavlova Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Lune Tree Blossom |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "pavlova" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I lova good Pavlova. |willow = It's so delicate looking, I just want to smush it. |wolfgang = Look very delicate, not like mighty Wolfgang. |wendy = It's brittle and delicate, like life itself. |wx78 = THE TEXTURE IS DIFFICULT TO CLASSIFY |wickerbottom = It takes its name from the Russian ballerina Anna Pavlova. |woodie = Reminds me of the snow-capped mountains back home. |maxwell = It has a certain elegance to it. |wigfrid = Önce the berries hath been remöved, t'is a fine dish indeed. |webber = We love anything with sugar! |winona = Is cake supposed to crunch? Not that I'm complainin'! |warly = Ah, a fresh carrot! |wortox = I'm afraid you can't fool me. |wormwood = Crunchy. |wurt = Fancy cook man call it a mer... mer-ingy... mer-angy... |walter = Mmmm, it almost reminds me of a perfectly roasted marshmallow. |wanda = It's crispier then I expected, but not unpleasantly so. |choose = wurt }} {{clear}} ==Pickled Herring== {{Object Infobox |description =A salty seasonal supper. |name = Pickled Herring |icon =Pickled Herring.png |image = Pickled Herring Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Flint/DST |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Salt Crystals |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "pickledherring" |cooktimeFeast = 24 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = You won't be herring any complaints from me. |willow = How does it smell so good? |wolfgang = Good fish, get in belly. |wendy = It tastes... good. |wx78 = PRESERVED FISH FLESH |wickerbottom = I do enjoy some pickled herring around the holidays. |woodie = It actually looks pretty good. |maxwell = I supposed I can't be picky. |wigfrid = A briny taste öf the sea! |webber = It looks tasty but... pickled fish? |winona = It's actually not bad! |warly = It's really quite delicious. |wortox = Shall I pick a peck of pickled herrings? |wormwood = Salty Glub Glub. |wurt = Grow! Grow! |walter = Pickling is a really practical way to store food supply. |wanda = It must be a sort of delicacy. |choose = wanda }} {{clear}} ==Polish Cookies== {{Object Infobox |description =Just like babcia used to make. |name = Polish Cookies |icon =Polish Cookies.png |image = Polish Cookies Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Butterfly Wings |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "polishcookie" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I'll polish off this whole plate! |willow = Yup, I'll be having ten more of those. |wolfgang = Ah, bring back good memories. |wendy = I suppose... it wouldn't hurt to have one... |wx78 = PROCEEDING TO CLEAR COOKIES |wickerbottom = Now it feels like the holidays. |woodie = Whoops, I think I got some jam in my beard. |maxwell = How quaint. |wigfrid = My nöse shall nöt be deceived, these are surely meat! |webber = Yay, we love cookies! |winona = Tasty! |warly = A rich pastry with a sweet fruity filling. |wortox = You can't prank a prankster, Hyuyu! |wormwood = Sweet belly stuff. |wurt = Yummy fruit pockets! |walter = It has fruit inside, it has to be at least a little healthy. |wanda = I'll just put a few extras in my pocket... don't mind me. |choose = maxwell }} {{clear}} ==Pumpkin Pie== {{Object Infobox |description =Gourd tidings we bring. |name = Pumpkin Pie |icon =Pumpkin Pie.png |image = Pumpkin Pie Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Ashes |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Phlegm |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "pumpkinpie" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I should probably just eat the whole thing.. for science. |willow = Yep, I'm eating this whole thing. |wolfgang = Wolfgang's belly is going to grow bigger then muscles... |wendy = Is it sweet enough to help me forget the bitterness in my heart? |wx78 = THE SWEET PUMPKIN MUSH FUELS ME |wickerbottom = Perhaps just a nibble... |woodie = I won't say no to some pie. |maxwell = Well... perhaps just a slice. |wigfrid = T'is surely a deliciöus meat pie in disguise! |webber = We'd like a big slice, please! |winona = T'is the season for some good eatin'! |warly = Simple and classic. |wortox = Don't be shy, try the pie! |wormwood = Mmmm... |wurt = Mmmmmmmmmm! |walter = Mmmm, cut me a big slice! |wanda = Why waste time cutting it into slices when I can just eat the whole thing? |choose = wanda }} {{clear}} ==Roasted Turkey== {{Object Infobox |description =Gobble-gobble it up. |name = Roasted Turkey |icon =Roasted Turkey.png |image = Roasted Turkey Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Log/DST |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Charcoal/DST |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "roastturkey" |cooktimeFeast = 24 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = I see a big juicy drumstick with my name on it. |willow = Everything tastes better with fire. |wolfgang = Wolfgang hungry for bird meat! |wendy = The holidays were cut short for this poor bird. |wx78 = I WILL FEAST ON THE DEAD BIRD FLESH |wickerbottom = I do hope it had enough time in the oven. |woodie = My favorite type of bird is a roasted one. |maxwell = I myself will carve this roast beast. |wigfrid = A glöriöus feast indeed! |webber = Can we have the wishbone? |winona = Now that's a beautiful bird! |warly = The Pièce of résistance to any holiday feast! |wortox = It certainly looks like a turkey. |wormwood = Tweeter go in belly! |wurt = It look like yucky turkey, but smell like veggies? |walter = Woby wants some too! |wanda = What an enormous turkey leg! |choose = wortox }} {{clear}} ==Stuffing== {{Object Infobox |description =Stuff your face! |name = Stuffing |icon =Stuffing.png |image = Stuffing Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Beard Hair/DST |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "stuffing" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = That's the good stuff! |willow = Out of the turkey and into my stomach! |wolfgang = Bread chunks very good! |wendy = Perhaps filling my belly will make me feel less empty inside. |wx78 = I ENJOY THESE SMALL BREAD CHUNKS |wickerbottom = Pairs perfectly with some turkey and gravy. |woodie = I'm stuffed to the brim! |maxwell = Something to fill the void in my stomach. |wigfrid = It bears the scent öf meat. I will sample a mörsel. |webber = It smells so good! |winona = I could eat this for days! |warly = To preserve the crispness, I actually cook it separate from the turkey. |wortox = Why fill yourself with dread when you could fill yourself with bread? |wormwood = Tasty bready bits |wurt = Tasty bready bits. |walter = I could stuff a bit more in my mouth. |wanda = I'm never too full for a little extra stuffing. |choose = woodie }} {{clear}} ==Sweet Potato Casserole== {{Object Infobox |description =It's a marshmallow world in the winter. |name = Sweet Potato Casserole |icon =Sweet Potato Casserole.png |image = Sweet Potato Casserole Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Rocks/DST |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "sweetpotato" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = Science has created a hybrid between dinner and dessert. |willow = Don't mind if I do. |wolfgang = Is very sweet, but see no potato. |wendy = Oh Abigail, remember how mother would make this every year? |wx78 = ERROR: NOT POTATO |wickerbottom = It's always a hit at holiday get-togethers. |woodie = Don't mind if I do! |maxwell = How very... rustic. |wigfrid = Marshmallöws ön meat... t'is an ödd choice, but deliciöus! |webber = Are those marshmallows on top? |winona = Sticks to yer ribs! |warly = All the sweetness of the holidays. |wortox = Should I tell them it's just a prank? Hyuyu! |wormwood = Yummy yum! |wurt = This even better then normal potato! |walter = It just isn't the holidays without it! |wanda = An odd recipe, but I can't say I don't enjoy it. |choose = wilson }} {{clear}} ==Tamales== {{Object Infobox |description =Spice up your holiday spread. |name = Tamales |icon =Tamales.png |image = Tamales Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Stinger |multiplier2 = 2 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "tamales" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = If I eat much more I'm going to start to feel a little husky. |willow = It's like a little bit of fire in my mouth! |wolfgang = Was Wolfgang not supposed to eat husk of corn? |wendy = Little pockets of warmth in this cold world. |wx78 = YES. I WILL EAT THEM ALL |wickerbottom = The spice is actually quite mild, quite to my liking. |woodie = These'll spice up our holiday feast, eh? |maxwell = They've got a bit of kick to them. |wigfrid = Öh hö! This bready wrap hides a mörsel öf spiced meat! |webber = Mmm, spicy! |winona = Now that'll warm you right up! |warly = You can taste the care that went into this dish. |wortox = Very convincing. |wormwood = Friends holding it. |wurt = Mmm, hot veggie bits inside. |walter = Whoa, these are tasty! |wanda = They're piping hot! |choose = wendy }} {{clear}} ==Tourtiere== {{Object Infobox |description =A savory seasonal pie. |name = Tourtiere |icon =Tourtiere.png |image = Tourtiere Dropped.png |ingredient1 = Holiday Cheer |multiplier1 = 1 |ingredient2 = Birchnut |multiplier2 = 1 |ingredient3 = Pine Cone |multiplier3 = 1 |canBeBurned=1 |durability = 180 uses |spawnCode = "tourtiere" |cooktimeFeast = 20 sec }} {{Quotes |wilson = Pleased to eat you. |willow = Get into my pie hole! |wolfgang = Is pie filled with much protein! |wendy = I cannot be comforted by comfort food... but I will have some more... |wx78 = IT'S A DELICIOUS FLESH PIE |wickerbottom = A rather hearty meat pie. |woodie = If only I had some ketchup! |maxwell = I haven't had a meat pie since I left Liverpool. |wigfrid = Pie hath redeemed itself! |webber = We've never meat in a pie before. |winona = Now that's a good meat pie! |warly = Ah oui, now that's a meat pie! |wortox = A pie, not sweet, but filled with meat. |wormwood = Mmm... hot belly stuff |wurt = Mmm, is hot veggie pie! |walter = My cousin from the west coast made this for us one, they're the best! |wanda = This is exactly what I imagined a mincemeat pie would be like. |choose = wolfgang }} {{clear}} =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Wortox's quotes for many Winter's Feast Dishes seem to suggest that none of the food is actually real, and is instead an illusion created by [[Holiday Cheer]]. * Some of the dishes seem to change their form depending on who is eating them, with Wigfrid commenting on the presence of meat in vegetable dishes, and Wurt claiming that meat dishes are actually vegetables in disguise. * Maxwell's quote for Roasted Turkey is a possible reference to [[wikipedia:How_the_Grinch_Stole_Christmas!|How the Grinch Stole Christmas]], in which the Whos of Whoville eat a "roast beast" as part of their celebrations. After the Grinch has a change of heart, he is invited to the Whos' feast and ends up carving the roast beast himself. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Pumpkin Pie 128x128.png|Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
